title: palicourea costanensis
intro: Palicourea costanensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Costan's palicourea or palicourea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Palicourea costanensis include its potential in treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and circulation. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Palicourea costanensis are often used to make infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
